content_body: Five Couples Trip from Alabama and Mississippi!  Awesome - Amazing - Fabulous Time!  We even got snowed in - awesome, gorgeous!  They say they don't get a lot of snow here, but we got 3-4 inches at least and it snowed nonstop for over 24 hours!  We also renamed the Treehouse to BIRDhouse.  Thanks for a wonderful time!
title: Five Couples Trip in Blue Ridge, GA
